title: Streamlit Explorer: Database/Schema/Table Picker and Data Preview
story: As a data analyst, I want to select a Snowflake database, schema, and table or view in the Streamlit Explorer and preview the data so that I can quickly inspect my data without writing SQL queries.
description:
Build the core UX for the Streamlit Explorer that allows users to navigate their Snowflake data hierarchy and preview table contents.

The user flow:
1. Select a database from a dropdown
2. Select a schema from the filtered list
3. Select a table or view from the filtered list
4. Click 'Preview' to execute a SELECT * and display results in a data table

A demo video of the target solution is available for reference.
acceptance_criteria: User can select a database from a dropdown of available databases
User can select a schema from the selected database
User can select a table or view from the selected schema
Clicking preview executes SELECT * and displays results in a table
Data preview shows all columns and rows from the selected table/view
Dropdowns filter based on the parent selection
ux_changes: Cascading dropdown selectors for database, schema, and table/view. Data preview table showing SELECT * results with all columns.
middleware_changes: Snowflake query execution for metadata retrieval (databases, schemas, tables) and data preview (SELECT * from selected table/view).
api_changes: Snowflake SQL API calls for SHOW DATABASES, SHOW SCHEMAS, SHOW TABLES, and SELECT * queries.
implementation_notes: This is the core navigation and preview feature that subsequent features (ORDER BY, filters, GROUP BY) will build upon.
comment_summary: No comments. Ticket in To Do status.
